title: The Shepherd And His Dog. (From The Villager's Verse-Book.)
meaning:
This evocative piece by William Lisle Bowles, titled "The Shepherd And His Dog. (From The Villager's Verse-Book.)", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
